name: Bohrium
appearance: Bohrium is a highly radioactive metal.
uses: At present, bohrium is of research interest only.
naturalAbundance: Bohrium does not occur naturally and only a few atoms have ever been made. It will probably never be isolated in observable quantities. It was created by the so-called ‘cold fusion’ method. This involved the bombardment of bismuth with atoms of chromium.
biologicalRole: Bohrium has no known biological role.
